message:
feat(mobile): introduce Control Deck for enhanced mobile navigation and layout

- Added ControlDeck component for mobile, providing quick access to view, navigation, and tools.
- Implemented responsive layout adjustments for sequence grid and 3D model visibility based on device orientation.
- Updated CSS for mobile styles, including new control deck styles and improved sequence container dimensions.
- Enhanced Model3DView with a reset view button for better user interaction.
- Adjusted rendering settings for improved performance and readability on mobile devices.
